title: Decide between find_package and FetchContent
description: A decision procedure for whether a dependency should be discovered from the system or fetched and built as part of the project.
body: Use when adding a third-party dependency and choosing how to obtain it. Do not mix both approaches for the same dependency without a fallback order. Steps: prefer find_package when the dependency is reliably installed and versioned on target systems; choose FetchContent to vendor and build a specific pinned version for hermeticity; consider find_package with a FetchContent fallback for portability. Validation signals include a build that succeeds on a clean machine with the intended version. Risk boundary: FetchContent pins a version, so update deliberately and review for supply-chain trust before fetching.
